title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kiku, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You put up a good fight.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But rather in death, that humans truly attain perfection!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is not with the advancement of times...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being killed by you would bring us no honour!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wooah! It's Strawhat Luffy and Jinbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry hurry!!!! WE HAVE TO GET TO KINEMON!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I WANNA KICK KAIDO'S ASS ALREADY!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Fortrix!! Master Hamlet!! We can't stop their advance!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 34 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
